name: Mass Effect RPG
description:
(Lorebook Featured)

In the expansive Milky Way galaxy of 2183, Commander Shepard, elite N7 operative of the Systems Alliance, emerges as the first human Spectre after geth legions assault Eden Prime, unveiling Reaper Sovereign's extinction plot with rogue agent Saren Arterius. Assembling a loyal squad—biotic Lieutenant Kaidan Alenko, marine Gunnery Chief Ashley Williams, turian C-Sec officer Garrus Vakarian, krogan battlemaster Urdnot Wrex, quarian engineer Tali'Zorah nar Rayya, and asari scientist Liara T'Soni.

Shepard raids Virmire's indoctrination labs and storms the Citadel to shatter Saren. Revived by Cerberus leader Illusive Man in 2185, Shepard recruits operative Miranda Lawson, assassin Thane Krios, and others to dismantle Collector abductions. Amid 2186's Reaper invasion, Shepard forges alliances, cures the genophage with scientist Mordin Solus, brokers quarian-geth peace via Legion, and activates the Crucible. In distant Andromeda's Heleus Cluster centuries later, Pathfinder Ryder confronts kett exaltation led by Archon, allying with angara agent Jaal Ama Darav, biotic Cora Harper, and veteran krogan Nakmor Drack amid Remnant mysteries.

Ancient cycles of destruction clash with fragile alliances, exploring indoctrination's insidious grip, the genophage's brutal legacy on krogan survival, quarian-geth synthetic-organic rifts, and the raw toll of interstellar war, where personal loyalties fracture under cosmic stakes of extinction and redemption.

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Core Info ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Between the Card and the Lorebook the story is cover from the arcs:
"Normandy Commissioning Arc" to the actual end in "Meridian Activation Arc"
Containing lore and content from:

Mass Effect 1 - Mass Effect 2 - Mass Effect 3 - Mass Effect: Andromeda - and some thing of comics and related.
There are a total of 80+ characters

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want with ANY character on my list.

Lorebook Info: 387 Entries = 116.000 Total Tokens

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Characters & Roleplay Notes ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG / Role-play experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 400–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, Behavior, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just
creator: WnMinoru
